name: android-sdk-build-tools
title: android-sdk-build-tools
description:
Tools for building Android applications
The Android SDK includes a variety of tools that help you develop mobile
applications for the Android platform. The tools are classified into 3 groups:
SDK Tools, Platform-tools and Build-tools.
.
Build-tools is a component of the Android SDK required for building Android
application code.
.
This package pulls Android SDK Build-tool.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-sdk-build-tools because Tools for building Android applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-sdk-build-tools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-sdk-build-tools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-sdk-build-tools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
